scripts.dev:mock-server: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.mock-server.yml up -d --build mock-server
scripts.down:mock-server: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.mock-server.yml stop mock-server
scripts.logs:mock-server: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.mock-server.yml logs -f mock-server
